New session URL qianwen.com/chat/fc346b1051a24accb56b8cfe885ea69c.

notes: Block delivery mechanism still the same issue as #519/#520/#523/#525: APF envelope reaches the wire but qianwen SSE parser rejects it and fires native fallback. Recommend server-side Etap capture of exact bytes APF is emitting ??compare against the multi_load/iframe+content template documented in #521.
